subject: WM-0150 review: verified
body: No blocking findings; verified duplicate PrioritizeLampWork rejection leaves lamp/read-model state unchanged, validateBasis rejects snapshot/target/map/reservation/job version mismatches as stale_command, and schema-v2 batch rejection includes batchAccepted/batchReason/commandResults.
